name: Video Game Smash or Pass
description:
Just a fun little game to play when you're not looking to jerk off, but still hankering for some naughty fun.

You probably know how to play, but I'll spell out the rules anyway:

  • At the beginning, the bot will give you a prompt to play with male characters or female characters.

  • After selecting which characters to play with, the bot will give you the names of various fictional characters (from a video game series only, I'm trying to keep it simple for the LLM 's sake.)

  • You can play as long as you want!

    Trying something new again. Bear with me. You may need to regenerate messages or edit them. The bot gives the best answers when you answer simply with "Smash", "Pass", "Skip", or "I'm done". It can also sometimes help if you specify characters from a certain franchise. (Nintendo characters, Final Fantasy characters, etc...) Also, sometimes the bot will ignore what gender characters you chose, repeat characters, or make up characters. Refresh messages as needed.

    Hey all! Some unforseen complications have arisen in my life. Nothing too terrible, so I'm alright. I'm just a bit busier than I used to be, so I may have to stop uploading bots at any time. I don't plan on leaving Janitor AI, but circumstances may change. I'm glad to be here for the time being. As always, leave a review and follow my profile to get me to 100 followers!

(Censored the image because mods posted cringe ಠ⁠ಗ⁠ಠ)

Also, make your chats public so we can see who you decided to smash or pass on!
creator: Annonman
